## Problem

The problem or use case this feature would address.

## Proposed solution

What you would like to happen. If it touches the Tor protocol, note the relevant
`torspec` section.

## Alternatives considered

Other approaches you weighed and why you set them aside.

## Additional context

Anything else that helps evaluate the request.
